title: FDIC closes Newton County bank; assets acquired by Kentland Bank
description:

description:

title: State employees to receive one-time bonus of up to $2,500
description:
Gov. Mike Braun informed state employees Monday they will receive a one-time bonus in their July 29 paycheck. But they won’t receive an ongoing pay raise even though state tax revenue collections have been strong.

description:
